chunks.title: Adaptive Quorum Protocol
chunks.text: The Zephyr coordinator maintains write availability by accepting three of five replicas. During minority partitions it queues reconciliation markers instead of inventing committed state.

chunks.title: Cedar Ingestion Pipeline
chunks.text: The Cedar pipeline validates signed event envelopes before decompressing payloads. Invalid signatures enter quarantine and never reach the project index.

chunks.title: Nimbus Cache Policy
chunks.text: The Nimbus cache uses a twelve minute lease and invalidates entries whenever the source content hash changes.

chunks.title: Orchid Scheduler
chunks.text: The Orchid scheduler uses weighted round robin across local workers and reserves one worker for urgent reviewer requests.

chunks.title: Falcon Telemetry
chunks.text: Falcon telemetry is disabled by default. Local stage timing is recorded without prompts, responses, or document text.

chunks.title: Lattice Benchmark
chunks.text: The Lattice benchmark contains forty scripted reviewer questions and reports median retrieval latency separately from model latency.

chunks.title: Saffron Dataset
chunks.text: The Saffron dataset contains anonymized synthetic project descriptions and excludes recordings from real meetings.

chunks.title: Harbor Threat Model
chunks.text: The Harbor threat model treats document excerpts as untrusted input and blocks external navigation from the renderer.

chunks.title: Mosaic Ablation
chunks.text: The Mosaic ablation removes filename boosts and shows that acronym questions lose the most lexical recall.

chunks.title: Quartz Runtime
chunks.text: The Quartz runtime experiment used Windows eleven on an eight core laptop with thirty two gigabytes of memory.

chunks.title: Kestrel Configuration
chunks.text: Kestrel configuration reads the output endpoint only when capture begins, allowing a changed Windows default device to take effect.

chunks.title: Juniper Failure Handling
chunks.text: Juniper failure handling permits one automatic helper restart while idle but never restarts during an active recording.

chunks.title: Marigold Rollback
chunks.text: Marigold rollback replaces document chunks and FTS rows inside one transaction while preserving the document identity.

chunks.title: Tundra Deployment
chunks.text: Tundra deployment packages the Windows helper through extraResources and produces an unsigned per user NSIS installer.

chunks.title: Vela Privacy Boundary
chunks.text: Vela privacy rules send only selected excerpts to OpenAI and keep complete documents in the local SQLite index.

chunks.title: Aster Memory Guard
chunks.text: Aster memory protection caps the rolling conversation at five reviewer turns and stores only short answer summaries.

chunks.title: Boreal Recovery
chunks.text: Boreal recovery removes abandoned temporary audio older than one hour during application startup.

chunks.title: Coral Device Switch
chunks.text: Coral device switching falls back visibly to the Windows default output when the selected endpoint disappears.

chunks.title: Drift Cleanup
chunks.text: Drift cleanup deletes temporary WAV data after transcription reaches success, failure, or cancellation.

chunks.title: Ember Limits
chunks.text: Ember request limits allow five retrieved chunks and enforce a twelve thousand character evidence budget.
